name: Hologram Projector
description: Project a hologram of the user that synchronously replays the Wanderer's weapon attacks, dealing 35% of the Wanderer's damage dealt. Last for 15 seconds. 180-second cooldown.
advancements: Tap again to transpose to the hologram's position.
Increase volt damage by 2%, even if not deployed. Unavailable in Apex League.
Increase damage dealt by holograms to 50% of the Wanderer's damage. Transposing removes control effects.
